Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.skeletons

Class SkeletonJournalPanel.JournalDisplayEntry

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.skeletons.SkeletonJournalPanel.JournalDisplayEntry
Enclosing class:
SkeletonJournalPanel
public static class SkeletonJournalPanel.JournalDisplayEntry extends Object
Represents a single displayable row in the journal table. Each JournalDisplayEntry corresponds to one AccountingEntry from an AccountingTransaction. It flattens the transaction data for table display, showing details like date, transaction ID, account name, description, and debit/credit amounts. It also holds a reference to the original AccountingTransaction for operations like editing or deleting.

  • Constructor Details

    • JournalDisplayEntry

      public JournalDisplayEntry(AccountingTransaction tx, AccountingEntry entry)
      Constructs a new JournalDisplayEntry.
      Parameters:
      tx - The source AccountingTransaction. Must not be null.
      entry - The specific AccountingEntry within the transaction to display. Must not be null. The entry's account and amount details are used to populate debit/credit columns.

    • getOriginalTransaction

      public AccountingTransaction getOriginalTransaction()
      Gets the original AccountingTransaction from which this display entry was derived. This is useful for actions like editing or deleting the full transaction.
      Returns:
      The original AccountingTransaction.

    • getDate

      public String getDate()
      Gets the transaction date string. @return The date.

      public String getFundNumber()
      Returns the fund number.

    • getDebit

      public String getDebit()
      Gets the debit amount string for this entry line. Empty if it's a credit. @return The debit amount.

    • getCredit

      public String getCredit()
      Gets the credit amount string for this entry line. Empty if it's a debit. @return The credit amount.
